title: Hollinium chloride
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''[[Hollinium/Legends|Hollinium]] [[Chlorine/Legends|chloride]]''' was a [[Hyperbaride/Legends|hyperbaride]] salt produced on [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]] after [[Se'Lenti|The Scouring]]. It was toxic to any being or creature not native to Goroth Prime.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
